title: Sample
description: One row per tissue sample in the SAHA spatial omics consortium.

sample_id.description: Unique sample identifier derived from folder name (e.g. SAHA_CR_COL_A1_TAP01).

run_id.description: Run/batch identifier linking to runs.parquet (e.g. TAP01, EC02, SJJP01).

generation_institution.description: Institution that performed the data acquisition run.

tissue_source_institution.description: Institution that sourced the tissue (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country appended if needed).

anatomical_region.description: Short tissue-type code from the source manifest (e.g. COL, LIV, APE).

panel_plex.description: Number of targets (genes or proteins) in the panel.

n_cells.description: Number of cells detected after segmentation.

n_fovs.description: Number of fields of view (CosMx) or sections (Xenium) in this sample.

qc_pass.description: Whether the sample passed QC review.

s3_raw_prefix.description: S3 URI prefix for raw instrument output (e.g. s3://saha-open-data/cosmx/wcm/TAP01/SAHA_CR_COL_A1_TAP01/).

s3_processed_path.description: S3 URI for the processed AnnData/Seurat object.

on_wasabi.description: Whether raw data is currently mirrored on Wasabi object storage.
